2010 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki

Chronology
2009 in KSW 2010 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki 2011 in KSW

The year 2010 was the seventh year in the history of the Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Poland. In 2010 Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki held 4 events beginning with, KSW: KSW Elimination.

List of events

[edit]
# Event Title Date Arena Location
1 KSW Elimination 3 April 1, 2010 CWKS Legia Boxing Club Warsaw, Poland
2 KSW 13: Kumite May 7, 2010 Spodek Katowice, Poland
3 KSW 14: Judgment Day September 18, 2010 Atlas Arena Łódź, Poland
4 KSW Fight Club October 9, 2010 Ryn Castle Ryn, Poland

Title fights

[edit]
Title fights in 2010
# Weight Class Method Round Time Event Notes
1 Lightheavyweight 93 kg Mamed Khalidov (c) draw Ryuta Sakurai Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00 KSW 13: Kumite For the KSW Light Heavyweight Championship.
2 Middleweight 84 kg Krzysztof Kulak def. Vitor Nóbrega Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00 KSW 13: Kumite For the Vacant KSW Middleweight Championship.

KSW Elimination 3

KSW: KSW Elimination[1] was a mixed martial arts event held on April 1, 2010, at the CWKS Legia Boxing Club in Warsaw, Poland.

Light Heavyweight 93 kg Lukasz Skibski def. Tomasz Molski Decision (Unanimous) 2

KSW 13: Kumite[2] was a mixed martial arts event held on May 7, 2010, at Spodek in Katowice, Poland.

Results

[edit]

Weight Class Method Round Notes

KSW 14: Judgment Day

KSW 14: Judgment Day[3] was a mixed martial arts event held on September 18, 2010, at the Atlas Arena in Łódź, Poland.

Results

[edit]
Fight Card
Weight Class Method Round Notes
Heavyweight 120 kg Mariusz Pudzianowski def. Eric "Butterbean" Esch TKO (Submission to punches) 1

KSW 14 KSW Fight Club KSW Extra 2

KSW Fight Club[4] was a mixed martial arts event held on October 9, 2010, at the Ryn Castle in Ryn, Poland.

Results

[edit]
Fight Card
Weight Class Method Round Notes
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Antoni Chmielewski def. Gregory Babene Decision (Unanimous) 2
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Matteo Minonzio def. Wojciech Orłowski TKO (Punches) 2
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Grigor Ashughbabyan def. Lukasz Dzialowy Decision (Unanimous) 2
Welterweight 77 kg Aslambek Saidov def. Pawel Zydak KO (Punches) 1
Heavyweight 120 kg Dmitry Zabolotny def. Marcin Bartkiewicz Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 1
